items.title: 💔 SIR TONY HOARE HAS DIED
items.description: Computer science legend Tony Hoare passed away: - Invented **Quicksort** (1960) - Created **Hoare logic** (formal verification) - Developed **CSP** (Communicating Sequential Processes) - Turing Award winner (1980) - Famous quote: "Null references: my billion-dollar mistake" **Context:** CSP influenced Go's concurrency model, Hoare logic is foundational to formal methods.
